channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Best Robotic Pool Cleaners of 2026: Beatbot, iGarden, Dreame
item.description: Send the pool guy packing. Let one of these robotic buddies maintain your water quality instead.

item.title: I helped drive this record-setting EV across Britain on sunshine alone — and the 870-mile trip cost absolutely nothing
item.description: For the first time, a production EV has driven the 870 miles from Land's End to John o'Groats on solar energy alone, without taking a single unit from the grid. I went along for a wild ride that was absolutely free.

item.title: The Holy Grail of LED cinema: World's largest screen is the size of 700 TVs and packs 44 million pixels
item.description: A 30-meter, 44-million-pixel LED wall fires sound through the pixels, solving one of the biggest audio-centric challenges which plagued previous designs.

item.title: Here’s How Apple Is Updating Its Child Safety Features in iOS 27
item.description: Apple has announced several new Child Safety features coming soon to iPhones and other devices. Here’s what’s changing.

item.title: 28 Best STEM Toys for Kids (2026): Learning Made Fun
item.description: We found lots of math-filled and science-rich toys for tiny nerds to assemble, bake, squish—or even tear apart and rebuild.

item.title: Scientists’ Side Hustle? Using AI and Quantum Computing to Generate New Peptides
item.description: Researchers cobbled together funding and time to show how quantum computing could aid in the development of drugs to help underserved populations and combat rare diseases.

item.title: The 25 housing markets where home prices went parabolic over the past 40 years
item.description: Among the 385 metro-area housing markets tracked by the Freddie Mac House Price Index, these 25 metros have seen the most home price gains since 1986. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Canicule et PlayStation : l’actu tech de la semaine
item.description: L'actualité tech de la semaine est marquée par la canicule et tous les sujets autour des climatiseurs. En parallèle, Sony et PlayStation ont aussi fait couler beaucoup d'encre...

item.title: Best External Hard Drives (2026): SSD to Store Data, Video, and More
item.description: Need an ultrafast drive for video editing or a rugged option to back up your photos in the field? We’ve got a solution for every situation.

item.title: J’ai testé cette manette pour smartphones en promo à 30 €, mais mieux vaut mettre 10 € de plus pour en avoir une meilleure
item.description: Les manettes pour jouer sur smartphone sont nombreuses, mais les solutions les plus abordables ne sont pas forcément les meilleures. Par exemple, la GameSir X5 Lite est souvent en promotion à moins de 30 euros et j'ai pu la tester pendant quelques semaines, mais je vous avoue que ça m'a un peu refroidi avec les jeux mobiles.
